typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Data_Src as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_MaxSK as integer (),
	var_Dim_Query as string (),
	var_Duplicate_Rec as string (),
	var_Dw_Effective_End_Date as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	var_Dw_Run_Month as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_Initial_Catalog1 as string (),
	var_Password as string (),
	var_ProjectID as integer (),
	var_Row_Count as integer (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string (),
	var_User_Name as string ()
}

source(output(
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		Modified as timestamp,
		TaskCategoryID as integer,
		SubCategory as string,
		TaskCategoryType as string,
		TaskCategory as string,
		Created as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::var_Dim_Query',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCTaskCategory	source(output(
		TaskCategorySK as integer,
		TaskCategoryID as integer,
		TaskCategory as string,
		TaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Create_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		SubCategory as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dw.D_taskCategory where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE	source(output(
		TaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TaskCategoryType as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select TaskCategoryTypeSK,TaskCategoryType, DW_Effective_Begin_Date, DW_Effective_End_Date from dw.D_TaskCategoryType where dw_current_flag=1 order by DW_Effective_Begin_Date desc',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPTaskCategoryTypeLKPTABLE
OLESRCTaskCategory derive(Modified_Begin_Date = toTimestamp(toString(Modified, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		Modified_End_Date = toTimestamp(toString(Modified, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy')) ~> DERModifiedDate
LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE select(mapColumn(
		TaskCategorySK = TaskCategorySK,
		TaskCategoryID_newRenamed = TaskCategoryID,
		TaskCategory_newRenamed = TaskCategory,
		TaskCategoryTypeSK_newRenamed = TaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DW_Effective_End_Date,
		DW_Create_Datetime = DW_Create_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Datetime = DW_Update_Datetime,
		DW_Run_Key_newRenamed = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Update_Run_key = DW_Update_Run_key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag_newRenamed = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		DW_Current_Flag = DW_Current_Flag,
		SubCategory_newRenamed = SubCategory
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLEREFORMAT
DERModifiedDate,LKPTaskCategoryTypeLKPTABLE lookup(OLESRCTaskCategory@TaskCategoryType == LKPTaskCategoryTypeLKPTABLE@TaskCategoryType,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPTaskCategoryType
LKPTaskCategoryType select(mapColumn(
		Modified_Begin_Date = Modified_Begin_Date,
		Modified_End_Date = Modified_End_Date,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		Modified = Modified,
		TaskCategoryID = TaskCategoryID,
		SubCategory = SubCategory,
		TaskCategoryType = OLESRCTaskCategory@TaskCategoryType,
		TaskCategory = TaskCategory,
		Created = Created,
		{} = {},
		TaskCategoryTypeSK = TaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DW_Effective_End_Date
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPTaskCategoryTypeSelect
LKPTaskCategoryTypeSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPTaskCategoryTypeIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPTaskCategoryTypeIsMatch@Match derive(var_End_Date = toTimestamp(toString($User__var_Dw_Effective_End_Date, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Begin_Date = toTimestamp(toString(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt, toString(toTimestamp(toString(Modified, 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'))), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Curr_Flag = 1,
		var_Update_Run_Key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key,
		var_TaskCategoryTypeSK = iif(isNull(TaskCategoryTypeSK), -(3), TaskCategoryTypeSK),
		var_TaskCategoryType = iif(isNull(TaskCategoryType), '', TaskCategoryType),
		var_Subcategory = iif(isNull(SubCategory), '', SubCategory),
		var_TaskCategory = iif(isNull(TaskCategory), '', TaskCategory),
		var_Run_Key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key) ~> DERDerivedFields
DERDerivedFields derive(drv_var_TaskCategory = toString(var_TaskCategory),
		drv_var_TaskCategoryType = toString(var_TaskCategoryType),
		drv_var_Subcategory = toString(var_Subcategory)) ~> DCSourceField1
DCSourceField1,LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLEREFORMAT lookup(TaskCategoryID == TaskCategoryID_newRenamed,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPTaskCategory
LKPTaskCategory split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@Match split(((trim(var_TaskCategory) != trim(TaskCategory_newRenamed)) || (trim(var_Subcategory) != trim(SubCategory_newRenamed)) || (var_TaskCategoryTypeSK != toInteger(TaskCategoryTypeSK_newRenamed))), disjoint: true) ~> CSPLPullChangedrecords@(csplUpdateInsertChange,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
CSPLPullChangedrecords@CSPLPullChangedrecordsTOCMDExpireoldrecordsLINK sink(input(
		{} as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CMDExpireoldrecords
CSPLPullChangedrecords@CSPLPullChangedrecordsTOCSPLPullChangedrecordsREFORMATDATATYPEDIFFLINK derive({} = toInteger({})) ~> CSPLPullChangedrecordsREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF
CSPLPullChangedrecordsREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF,LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@NotMatch union(byName: true) ~> ALLNewChangedRecords
ALLNewChangedRecords sink(input(
		TaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TaskCategory as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TaskCategoryID as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		SubCategory as string,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TaskCategoryTypeSK = var_TaskCategoryTypeSK,
		TaskCategory = drv_var_TaskCategory,
		DW_Current_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		DW_Effective_End_Date = var_End_Date,
		TaskCategoryID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag,
		SubCategory = drv_var_Subcategory,
		DW_Update_Run_key = var_Update_Run_Key,
		DW_Run_Key = var_Run_Key,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = var_Begin_Date)) ~> InsertinDTaskCategory
